list.name: Changes
list.comment: I made it really complicated want to save this to the autoloading branch

task.summary: Gont classes to work with composer for autoloadng casses and managing dependencies
Gont classes to work with composer for autoloadng casses and managing dependencies
Rewrote some classes implemented initial Request/Response successfully.
Created classes, interfaces, and welcomePage that assembles a webpage from components
Wrote and tested first draft of CreditCard class
Started working on microsevices and despatchers. Got first draft of content service working that sends page components.
I made it really complicated want to save this to the autoloading branch
